events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana across Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. Currently on day 11 of 16. Planning eyeglasses shopping and exploring onsen and Japanese food.
events.hook: Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses in Kyoto. Look up eyeglasses stores for early shopping.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
